name: zero-two-one
description: Zero Two One — an agentic product framework that takes new products from point 0 (idea) to point 1 (MVP) via project-level refinement loops and Spec Kit-driven feature delivery. (Root dev workspace — the publishable snapshot lives in package/.)

scripts.lint: find bin scripts -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check && sh -n hooks/pre-commit && sh -n scripts/run-qa.sh
scripts.test: node --test $(find test -name '*.test.js' -not -path 'test/e2e/*') && node scripts/speckit/spec-status.js list && node scripts/workflow-status.js
scripts.publish:package: npm run sync:package && npm run prepublish:check && cd package && npm publish

author: William Dingwall (billdingwall)
